mapper.select:
select oig.id, max(oigu.no) as no, oig.user_id, oig.status, oig.title, oig.tag, oig.content, oig.good_count, oig.middle_count, oig.bad_count, oig.collect_count, oig.view_count, oig.create_time, oig.update_time, ou.username as nickname, ou.avatar, case when exists ( select 1 from osh_info_gap_collect oigc where oigc.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oigc.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigc.collect_status = 1 and oigc.delete_flag = 0 ) then 1 else 0 end as isFollowed, ifnull(( select oigv.vote_type from osh_info_gap_vote oigv where oigv.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oigv.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigv.delete_flag = 0 limit 1 ), 0) as isVoted, max(case when oigtr.rn = 1 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_1, max(case when oigtr.rn = 2 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_2, max(case when oigtr.rn = 3 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_3 from osh_info_gap oig left join osh_info_gap_unique oigu on oigu.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigu.delete_flag = 0 left join osh_user ou on oig.user_id = ou.id left join ( select info_gap_id, gap_tag_id, row_number() over (partition by info_gap_id order by sort_no) as rn from osh_info_gap_tag_rel where delete_flag = 0) as oigtr on oig.id = oigtr.info_gap_id and oigtr.rn <= 3 left join osh_info_gap_tag oigt on oigtr.gap_tag_id = oigt.id and oigt.delete_flag = 0 where oig.status = 4 and oig.delete_flag = 0 group by oig.id
order by oig.good_count desc, oig.create_time desc
order by oig.create_time desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_info_gap (user_id, user_name, title, tag, content, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{title}, #{tag}, #{content}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_info_gap SET ${column} = ${column} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE osh_info_gap SET ${column} = GREATEST(${column} - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.select: select oig.id, max(oigu.no) as no, oig.user_id, oig.status, oig.title, oig.tag, oig.content, oig.good_count, oig.middle_count, oig.bad_count, oig.collect_count, oig.view_count, oig.create_time, oig.update_time, ou.username as nickname, ou.avatar, 1 as isFollowed, ifnull(( select oigv.vote_type from osh_info_gap_vote oigv where oigv.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oigv.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigv.delete_flag = 0 limit 1 ), 0) as isVoted, max(case when oigtr.rn = 1 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_1, max(case when oigtr.rn = 2 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_2, max(case when oigtr.rn = 3 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_3 from osh_info_gap oig left join osh_info_gap_unique oigu on oigu.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigu.delete_flag = 0 inner join osh_info_gap_collect oigc on oigc.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigc.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oigc.collect_status = 1 and oigc.delete_flag = 0 left join osh_user ou on oig.user_id = ou.id left join ( select info_gap_id, gap_tag_id, row_number() over (partition by info_gap_id order by sort_no) as rn from osh_info_gap_tag_rel where delete_flag = 0) as oigtr on oig.id = oigtr.info_gap_id and oigtr.rn <= 3 left join osh_info_gap_tag oigt on oigtr.gap_tag_id = oigt.id and oigt.delete_flag = 0 where oig.status = 4 and oig.delete_flag = 0 group by oig.id order by oig.create_time desc

select oig.id, max(oigu.no) as no, oig.user_id, oig.status, oig.title, oig.tag, oig.content, oig.good_count, oig.middle_count, oig.bad_count, oig.collect_count, oig.view_count, oig.create_time, oig.update_time, ou.username as nickname, ou.avatar, case when exists ( select 1 from osh_info_gap_collect oigc where oigc.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oigc.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigc.collect_status = 1 and oigc.delete_flag = 0 ) then 1 else 0 end as isFollowed, ifnull(( select oigv.vote_type from osh_info_gap_vote oigv where oigv.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oigv.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigv.delete_flag = 0 limit 1 ), 0) as isVoted, max(case when oigtr.rn = 1 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_1, max(case when oigtr.rn = 2 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_2, max(case when oigtr.rn = 3 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_3 from osh_info_gap oig left join osh_info_gap_unique oigu on oigu.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigu.delete_flag = 0 left join osh_user ou on oig.user_id = ou.id left join ( select info_gap_id, gap_tag_id, row_number() over (partition by info_gap_id order by sort_no) as rn from osh_info_gap_tag_rel where delete_flag = 0) as oigtr on oig.id = oigtr.info_gap_id and oigtr.rn <= 3 left join osh_info_gap_tag oigt on oigtr.gap_tag_id = oigt.id and oigt.delete_flag = 0 where oig.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oig.delete_flag = 0 group by oig.id order by oig.create_time desc

select oig.id, max(oigu.no) as no, oig.user_id, oig.status, oig.title, oig.tag, oig.content, oig.good_count, oig.middle_count, oig.bad_count, oig.collect_count, oig.view_count, oig.create_time, oig.update_time, ou.username as nickname, ou.avatar, case when exists ( select 1 from osh_info_gap_collect oigc where oigc.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oigc.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigc.collect_status = 1 and oigc.delete_flag = 0 ) then 1 else 0 end as isFollowed, ifnull(( select oigv.vote_type from osh_info_gap_vote oigv where oigv.user_id = #{currentUserId} and oigv.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigv.delete_flag = 0 limit 1 ), 0) as isVoted, max(case when oigtr.rn = 1 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_1, max(case when oigtr.rn = 2 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_2, max(case when oigtr.rn = 3 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_3 from osh_info_gap oig left join osh_info_gap_unique oigu on oigu.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigu.delete_flag = 0 left join osh_user ou on oig.user_id = ou.id left join ( select info_gap_id, gap_tag_id, row_number() over (partition by info_gap_id order by sort_no) as rn from osh_info_gap_tag_rel where delete_flag = 0 ) as oigtr on oig.id = oigtr.info_gap_id and oigtr.rn <= 3 left join osh_info_gap_tag oigt on oigtr.gap_tag_id = oigt.id and oigt.delete_flag = 0 where oig.status = 4 and oig.delete_flag = 0
and ( oig.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or oig.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and exists ( select 1 from osh_info_gap_tag_rel soigtr where soigtr.info_gap_id = oig.id and soigtr.gap_tag_id = #{tagId} and soigtr.delete_flag = 0 )
and oig.tag = #{category}
group by oig.id order by oig.update_time desc

select oig.id, max(oigu.no) as no, oig.user_id, oig.status, oig.title, oig.tag, oig.content, oig.good_count, oig.middle_count, oig.bad_count, oig.collect_count, oig.view_count, oig.create_time, oig.update_time, ou.username as nickname, ou.avatar, 0 as isFollowed, 0 as isVoted, max(case when oigtr.rn = 1 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_1, max(case when oigtr.rn = 2 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_2, max(case when oigtr.rn = 3 then oigt.tag_name end) as tag_3 from osh_info_gap oig left join osh_info_gap_unique oigu on oigu.info_gap_id = oig.id and oigu.delete_flag = 0 left join osh_user ou on oig.user_id = ou.id left join ( select info_gap_id, gap_tag_id, row_number() over (partition by info_gap_id order by sort_no) as rn from osh_info_gap_tag_rel where delete_flag = 0 ) as oigtr on oig.id = oigtr.info_gap_id and oigtr.rn <= 3 left join osh_info_gap_tag oigt on oigtr.gap_tag_id = oigt.id and oigt.delete_flag = 0 where oig.status = 4 and oig.delete_flag = 0 group by oig.id order by oig.good_count desc, oig.collect_count desc, oig.view_count desc limit 10
select * from osh_info_gap where status = 4 and delete_flag = 0 order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select no from osh_info_gap_unique where info_gap_id = #{infoGapId} and delete_flag = 0 limit 1
select gap_tag_id from osh_info_gap_tag_rel where info_gap_id = #{infoGapId} and delete_flag = 0 order by sort_no asc

select t.tag_name from osh_info_gap_tag_rel r inner join osh_info_gap_tag t on r.gap_tag_id = t.id where r.info_gap_id = #{infoGapId} and r.delete_flag = 0 and t.delete_flag = 0 order by r.sort_no asc
